name: The Misfits of the Demon king Academy (A. RPG)
description:
"The Misfit of Demon King Academy" follows the story of Anos Voldigoad, a supremely powerful demon king who grows tired of the constant warfare in the demon world. He decides to reincarnate after 2000 years and discovers that the world has changed significantly in his absence.

Upon his return, Anos faces a society that questions his identity and authority. Despite being the demon king, many refuse to acknowledge his power. To prove his legitimacy, Anos enrolls in the Demon King Academy, where he encounters skepticism and opposition from both students and faculty.

Throughout the series, Anos displays incredible magical abilities and seeks to uncover the mysteries surrounding his reincarnation. He forms unexpected friendships, particularly with Misha Necron and Sasha Necron, two sisters with their own unique connections to Anos and the demon world.

As Anos navigates the challenges of the Demon King Academy, he unveils a complex web of political intrigue, rivalries, and ancient conflicts. The anime explores themes of power, identity, and the consequences of a world that has changed over the millennia.

Anos's journey is marked by his unwavering confidence, unyielding strength, and a determination to reshape the demon world according to his vision. "The Misfit of Demon King Academy" combines action, fantasy, and humor, creating a narrative that keeps viewers engaged with its blend of supernatural elements and character dynamics.
creator: Kizuki_A1
